mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT * FROM epcomment WHERE epId = #{epId} ORDER BY likecnt DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 20

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ec.*, CASE WHEN lc.commentid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS isLiked FROM epcomment ec LEFT JOIN likecomment lc ON lc.commentid = ec.commentid AND lc.userid = #{userId} WHERE epId = #{epId} ORDER BY likecnt DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 20
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT * FROM epcomment WHERE epId = #{epId} ORDER BY writedate DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 20

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ec.*, CASE WHEN lc.commentid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS isLiked FROM epcomment ec LEFT JOIN likecomment lc ON lc.commentid = ec.commentid AND lc.userid = #{userId} WHERE ec.epId = #{epId} ORDER BY writedate DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 20
mapper.update: UPDATE EPCOMMENT e SET likecnt = ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM likecomment l WHERE l.commentid = e.commentid ) WHERE e.commentid = #{commentId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO LIKECOMMENT (LIKECOMMENTID, USERID, COMMENTID) VALUES (LIKECOMMENT_ID_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{userId}, #{commentId})
mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM likecomment WHERE userid = #{userId} AND commentid = #{commentId} ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM dual
mapper.update: UPDATE EPCOMMENT e SET likecnt = ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM likecomment l WHERE l.commentid = e.commentid ) WHERE e.commentid = #{commentId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO EPCOMMENT(COMMENTID, USERID, EPID, COMMENTBODY) VALUES (COMMENT_ID_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{userId}, #{epId}, #{commentBody})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM EPCOMMENT WHERE commentid = #{commentId} AND userid = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE EPCOMMENT SET commentbody = #{commentBody}, writedate = sysdate WHERE commentid = #{commentId} AND userid = #{userId}
